title: TFC Florae
description: A rather large addon to TFC that adds new biomes, terrain, flora and fauna, new mechanics and other things.
body: Welcome to TFC Florae, an addon for [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) which adds a plethora of new blocks, items and much more to the world and thereby spices it up a prodigious amount! This mod is especially something for you, if you find the base TerraFirmaCraft world to be a little lackluster. Examples of new content are new biomes, terrain, many new trees, plants, some fauna and mechanics, and a deep underground region with huge caves and underground forests and other dangers. Quite the adventure!
